name: @flowmemory/dashboard
description: FlowMemory dashboard, desktop app, and Android operator shell.
author: FlowmemoryAI

scripts.build: npm run sync:fixtures && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win --x64 --dir && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-desktop-wallet.ps1
scripts.desktop:installer:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis zip --x64
scripts.desktop:installer:mac: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --mac dmg zip
scripts.desktop:installer:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --linux AppImage zip
scripts.mobile:android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
scripts.mobile:android:debug: npm run mobile:android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
